variants: Xanthia Georgiou is a skilled professional specializing in petroleum engineering, where she has demonstrated her innovative capabilities through her invention, the Driftwood Logic Anchor. She is an active member of the Dragonfly Candlemakers Guild, partaking in her passion for crafting unique candles. The Greenstone Seed Grants serve as her primary funding source, enabling her to explore various projects and ideas within her field. With guidance from her mentor, Veselina Stancheva, Xanthia continues to grow and excel professionally while balancing her creative interests. Her commitment to both engineering and artistry defines her multifaceted career.
